name: Sweet Baked Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the onions and separate them.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Saute the onion pieces until they begin to caramelize, about 20-25 minutes.
4. Squeeze half the lemon juice into the pan and continue sauteing until the onions are deeply caramelized.
5. In an oven-proof bowl or dutch oven, combine the remaining olive oil, lemon juice from the reserved half of the lemon, balsamic vinegar, sugar, kosher salt, black pepper, and minced garlic.
6. Add the caramelized onions to the mixture in the bowl.
7. Transfer the dish to a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 5-10 minutes or until the onions are tender and glazed with the balsamic sauce.
Note: Ensure the oven is thoroughly cooled before handling it.
